creator: euan@potensol.com
text:
I'll look into this when I get time. I don't use the ActiveSync psrt of SOGo myself, so I was not aware it needed extra consideration. I will do my best to accomodate though. However, I will not be able to runtime test between releases of the port.

Perhaps a port option should be created adding the dependancy from 203551 (textproc/wbxml2).

I'm currently working throughtsome build warnings in the devel/sope and www/sogo ports. It's a lot of work. Once I'm done with that, I take a look at this addition to the port before I submit the next portrevision.

Thanks, I'll report back when I'm ready. I may need some help testing etc.
